parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant FireDepartment
participant FireBrigadeUnit

FireDepartment -> FireDepartment : **1** ustal typ zdarzenia(strategia, ustal losowy czas)
FireDepartment -> FireDepartment : **2** wybierz jednostke
FireDepartment -> FireBrigadeUnit : **3** wyslij x wozow
FireBrigadeUnit -> FireDepartment : **4** wyslalem y wozow

alt x==y
    FireDepartment -> FireDepartment : **5** koniec zgloszenia
else x-y>0
    FireDepartment -> FireDepartment : **6** wybierz jednostke
    FireDepartment -> FireBrigadeUnit : **7** wyslij x-y wozow
    FireBrigadeUnit -> FireDepartment : **8** wyslalem z wozow
end

FireDepartment -> FireBrigadeUnit : **9** wyslij -x wozow (oddaje ci x aut)

@enduml
```
